query:
-- 1. SG3D608: reassign to Logan Central Family Clinic (C0151)
UPDATE services
SET customerExternalId = 'C0151',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Reassigned from Cleveland Medical (C0061) to Logan Central Family Clinic (C0151) — Logan Medical plan billed to Logan Central, $35 ex GST is for eFax.')
WHERE externalId = 'SG3D608';

-- 2a. SSHKYHNC: cost → $5.00, revenue → $10.50
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 5.00, monthlyRevenue = 10.50,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Cost corrected to $5.00 (buying price), revenue corrected to $10.50 (selling price).')
WHERE externalId = 'SSHKYHNC';

-- 2b. SSCLR2F4: cost → $9.00 (already correct), revenue → $15.00
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 9.00, monthlyRevenue = 15.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Revenue corrected to $15.00 (selling price). Buying price $9.00 confirmed.')
WHERE externalId = 'SSCLR2F4';

-- 2c. S1220: revenue → $5.00 (cost $0.42 already correct)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyRevenue = 5.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Revenue corrected to $5.00 (1300 number sell price). Cost $0.42 confirmed.')
WHERE externalId = 'S1220';

-- 2d. S1301: revenue → $5.00 (cost $1.89 already correct)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyRevenue = 5.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Revenue corrected to $5.00 (1300 number sell price). Cost $1.89 confirmed.')
WHERE externalId = 'S1301';

-- 3. IPTEL-AB035443: revenue → $75.00, cost → $0.00, planName → Managed Voice Support (1-10 users)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyRevenue = 75.00, monthlyCost = 0.00,
    planName = 'Managed Voice Support (1-10 users)',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Renamed from "IP Tel 10 Number Block" to "Managed Voice Support (1-10 users)". Cost corrected to $0.00 (no wholesale cost), revenue confirmed $75.00.')
WHERE externalId = 'IPTEL-AB035443';

-- 4. S0467: cost → $109.00
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 109.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Cost corrected to $109.00 (Opticomm FTTP 100/40 wholesale price). Previous value $95.00 was incorrect.')
WHERE externalId = 'S0467';

-- 5. S1315: cost → $0.00, remove $49 placeholder note
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 0.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [MANUAL CORRECTION 2026-03-30] Cost reset to $0.00 — $49 was an Access4 pricebook placeholder, not an actual charge. Customer is not billed for this service.')
WHERE externalId = 'S1315';
command:
